prompt:
Hiking trail break — photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit man in his early 30s sitting on a sun-warmed flat rock on a hiking trail mid-morning, lightly sweaty, taking a break. He holds ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger, lifting it toward his slightly parted mouth — caught mid-action. He wears a fitted slate-grey moisture-wicking tee, dark hiking shorts, a simple leather watch, brown stubble, tanned skin, looking off into the distance with a satisfied half-smile.

DIRECT WARM NATURAL SUNLIGHT FALLS FULLY ON THE JAR sitting open on the rock beside him — the sunlight visibly illuminates the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents and grazing the curved black plastic side with a bright clean rim-light. A few sugar-dusted gummy CUBES rest loose on a folded bandana next to the jar, also brightly lit by direct sunlight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: a softly out-of-focus mountain trail vista — distant pine trees, a hint of rolling hills, blue sky with light haze, golden grass underfoot. Bright outdoor depth, slightly desaturated nature tones.

Lighting: bright clean direct outdoor sunlight wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man — sun from the upper-right grazes the man's shoulder and cheek and falls fully on the jar's label, integrating subject and product in the same natural light. Color grade is warm-but-clean, editorial outdoor-active campaign feel (Patagonia / Athletic Greens outdoor shoot).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man seated, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the rock with full sunlight on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.5 shallow depth, natural skin texture and stubble, realistic sun-on-skin highlights, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
